generated_images.prompt: Editorial-style photograph of a clean, modern auto body shop interior. A pristine vehicle — a glossy black SUV — sits center-frame under dramatic overhead lighting, its paint reflecting shop lights like a mirror. The environment is orderly: tool boards on the wall are visible but not cluttered, concrete floor is clean, the space feels professional and trustworthy. Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, the car is the hero. Not staged or faked — aspirational automotive imagery. 4K, professional photography quality.
generated_images.license_note: Synthetic image. Do not represent as actual company work.
